institution.name: CUNY Graduate School and University Center

flags.label: Earnings trend · post-entry horizons
flags.summary: Earnings 10 years post-entry at CUNY Graduate School and University Center are 4% below 6-year earnings ($68.6k → $66.0k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at CUNY Graduate School and University Center fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (0.4% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at CUNY Graduate School and University Center rose 20% between 2021 and 2024 (2.7k → 3.3k).
